institution.name: William Paterson University of New Jersey

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at William Paterson University of New Jersey fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (56.0% → 44.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at William Paterson University of New Jersey rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.2k → $15.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at William Paterson University of New Jersey rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.9k → $25.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at William Paterson University of New Jersey vs the 2018–2022 baseline (47.7% vs 55.0%).
